name: Marble Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
The 1 oz square of unsweetened Chocolate should be melted.
1. Combine crumbs, sugar, and margarine; press onto bottom of 9-inch Spring-form cake pan. Bake at 350 degrees F., for 10 minutes.
2. Combine cream cheese, sugar, and vanilla; beat until well blended. Add eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
3. Blend chocolate into 1 cup batter.
4. Spoon alternating layers of plain and chocolate batters over the crust; cut through batters several times with a knife for the marble effect.
5. Bake at 450 degrees F., for 10 minutes.
6. Reduce oven temperature to 250 degrees F.; continue baking for an additional 30 minutes.
7. Loosen cake from rim of pan; cool before removing rim of pan.
8. Chill.
